name: fab-library-advisor
description: Suggest relevant assets from each user's own Fab library during Unreal Engine work.

interface.shortDescription: Recommend assets from your own Fab library.
interface.longDescription: Indexes non-sensitive metadata from each user's authenticated Fab My Library view, recommends owned assets, and checks once daily for verified plugin updates.
defaultPrompt: Search my private Fab catalog first and sync focused owned results only when needed.
Check for a Fab Library Advisor update when the daily check is due.
Check my owned Fab assets for this Unreal task.
Recommend owned assets that fit the current map.
